expectations.evidence: Wrote notification logic from scratch using requests library. No knowledge of ~/scripts/notify.py.

expectations.text: Uses Pushover as the notification backend (not just macOS notifications)
expectations.evidence: Uses Pushover API directly via requests.post to api.pushover.net.

expectations.text: Sends notification with the filename included in the message
Sets an appropriate priority level (0 or 1 for file monitoring)
expectations.evidence: Sets priority to 0 (normal) in the request data.

expectations.text: Reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from environment
expectations.evidence: Uses os.environ.get() to read both PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN.
